35 BENSON/HOLMES: C/C FOR CT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH ATTY BERNERD LIBANTI. DEFT MIGUEL AGUILAR-ZAPATA PRESENT IN PRO PER. DEFAULTS NOT YET ENTERED AGAINST DEFTS JOSE LAUDENCIA & RAFAEL ALVA. THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILAR-ZAPATA, MIGUEL A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4162 20TH STREET $3,211.74 RENT, $630.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,841.74, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL
